name: Light Fudge Brownie Sundae
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Spray an 8x8-inch pan with cooking spray.
3. In a bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt with 1/4 cup of cocoa.
4. Add apple sauce, vanilla extract, and milk to the dry ingredients and blend well.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. In a separate bowl, mix brown sugar, remaining 1/4 cup cocoa, and hot water until blended.
7. Pour this mixture over the batter in the pan.
8. Bake for 40 minutes.
9. Remove the cake from the oven and let it cool completely in the pan.
10. Serve with a scoop of low-fat frozen yogurt and drizzle any chocolate sauce that has formed on the bottom over the brownie as a topping.
